data.content:
Planning completed for interactive Copilot session support.

Recommended execution order
1. `foolery-9493`: make Copilot an interactive shared-session dialect in claimed-step and take-loop startup, preserving model flags and removing Codex-only interactive selection.
2. `foolery-5f6b`: wire Copilot protocol completion/session signals into the shared event model and transport abstraction so follow-up, close-input, watchdog, retry, and abort semantics come from the common runtime.
3. `foolery-29fa`: add fixture and regression coverage for success, watchdog timeout, retry, and abort behavior.

Key files expected to change
- `src/lib/agent-session-capabilities.ts`
- `src/lib/agent-adapter.ts`
- `src/lib/terminal-manager-initial-child.ts`
- `src/lib/terminal-manager-initial-io.ts`
- `src/lib/terminal-manager-take-child.ts`
- interactive transport wrapper around `src/lib/codex-jsonrpc-session.ts`
- Copilot fixtures/tests/docs listed in the plan note

Primary risk
- Copilot session handshake/completion semantics may differ from the current Codex transport wrapper; keep the transport layer narrow and require explicit protocol completion before post-exit success classification.
